description.value:
You've constantly adapted your form to learn more about the creatures and environment around you. While you've gained plenty of knowledge, it came with a price. Through decades of modification, the sequencing of your genetic code has broken down and become unstable. You're more transparent than most barathus, resembling an ooze-like creature.

You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Become Ooze] action.
